text: The following is a guidance document published by the Department of Housing and Urban Development Office  of  Field  Policy  and  Management  for  the  purpose  of  providing  answers  to  frequently  asked questions about Section 3 of the HUD Act of 1968 (12 U.S.C § 1701u) and its associated regulations (24 C.F.R.  Part  75).  This  document  is  intended  to  provide  guidance  for  Section  3  funding  recipients, subrecipients, contractors, subcontractors, workers, and other stakeholders.
